# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `BI-260010`
- Title: `Implement responsive navigation menu for mobile devices`
- Requirement: [`FR-010`](../requirements/REQ-FR-260010.md)
- Persona/Actor: `Mobile site visitor navigating on smartphone or small tablet`
- Value statement: `For mobile users, provide a clean, accessible navigation experience to achieve better usability and prevent navigation frustration on small screens.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `On screens <768px, navigation transforms to mobile layout with hamburger menu trigger.`
  - `Hamburger menu reveals vertical navigation overlay with all items accessible.`
  - `Mobile menu includes language switcher and maintains accessibility standards.`
  - `Menu can be dismissed via outside tap, close button, or navigation action.`
  - `Desktop navigation remains unchanged and functional.`
  - `No horizontal overflow or text wrapping occurs on mobile navigation.`
- Dependencies: `FR-009 multilingual support; QR-001 quality checks.`
- Validation approach: `Responsive testing across 320px-768px widths plus accessibility audit and lint/build verification.`
- Priority score: `75`
- Target window: `Phase 2`
- Links:
  - Requirement: [`requirements/REQ-FR-260010.md`](../requirements/REQ-FR-260010.md)
  - ADR: `adr/ADR-260010.md`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
